task: Add the cheapest certified refurbished iPad Air with 256GB of storage in any shade of blue to my bag.
final_result_response:
I have successfully added the cheapest certified refurbished iPad Air with 256GB storage in blue to the bag. The item added is:

- **Refurbished 11-inch iPad Air (M2) Wi-Fi 256GB - Blue** at **$549.00** (originally $649.00, saving $100.00)

The bag now shows a total of $605.84 (including estimated tax of $52.84 and free shipping). This was the cheapest blue iPad Air with 256GB available in the certified refurbished store, confirmed by sorting all iPad Air models with 256GB storage by "Price: Low to High."
thoughts: I need to navigate to Apple's Certified Refurbished section. Let me go to the refurbished store.
I can see the refurbished iPad page with filters. The sort is already "Price: Low to High". Let me scroll down to see more filters and apply storage and model filters.
I can see the filter sidebar. Let me first click on "iPad Air 10.9"" to filter for iPad Air models, then also apply the 256GB storage filter.
I've filtered by iPad Air 10.9". Now I need to also expand the Storage filter to select 256GB. Let me click on "Storage" to expand it.
I see Connectivity expanded instead. Let me click on the Storage filter to expand it.
Let me click directly on the Storage filter header to expand it.
Let me try clicking on the chevron icon next to Storage to expand it.
Let me try navigating directly to the refurbished iPad Air with 256GB filter via URL.
Let me scroll down to see the filters and try a different approach to expand Storage.
Now I can see the Storage filter. Let me click on it to expand it.
The Storage filter is now expanded. I can see 256GB option. Let me click on it.
I accidentally selected 512GB. Let me click on 256GB instead.
I've selected 256GB. Now I need to also filter by iPad Air models. Let me expand the Models filter.
The Models filter is expanded and 256GB is selected. Let me click on "iPad Air 10.9"" to filter for iPad Air models.
I can see iPad Air 10.9" with 256GB storage, sorted by price low to high. The cheapest is $499 in Space Gray. Let me scroll down to find blue options.

I can see the iPad Air 10.9" 256GB results. The blue option is "Refurbished iPad Air Wi-Fi + Cellular 256GB - Blue (5th Generation)" at $629.00. Let me also check iPad Air 11" for potentially cheaper blue options. Let me scroll up to the Models filter.
Let me now check iPad Air 11" for blue 256GB options.
Excellent! I can see a "Refurbished 11-inch iPad Air (M2) Wi-Fi 256GB - Blue" at $549.00. Let me scroll down to see all results and confirm this is the cheapest blue option.

I can see the results sorted by price. The cheapest blue iPad Air 256GB is the "Refurbished 11-inch iPad Air (M2) Wi-Fi 256GB - Blue" at $549.00. Since results are sorted low to high, this is the cheapest blue option. Let me scroll down to confirm there are no cheaper blue options.
I can see the M3 blue at $589.00 which is more expensive. Let me continue scrolling to see all results.
The cheapest blue iPad Air with 256GB is confirmed to be the "Refurbished 11-inch iPad Air (M2) Wi-Fi 256GB - Blue" at $549.00. Let me scroll back up to click on it.
I can see the "Refurbished 11-inch iPad Air (M2) Wi-Fi 256GB - Blue" at $549.00. Let me click on it.
Let me click directly on the product title text.
I'm on the product page for the "Refurbished 11-inch iPad Air (M2) Wi-Fi 256GB - Blue" at $549.00. Let me scroll down to find the "Add to Bag" button.
I need to scroll down further to find the "Add to Bag" button.
I can see the AppleCare options with "No AppleCare coverage" selected. Let me scroll down to find the "Add to Bag" button.
I can see the "Add to Bag" button. Let me click on it to add this iPad Air to the bag.

The item has been successfully added to the bag! I can see the bag page showing:

- **Refurbished 11-inch iPad Air (M2) Wi-Fi 256GB - Blue** at **$549.00**
- Bag total is $605.84 (including estimated tax)

The cheapest certified refurbished iPad Air with 256GB storage in blue has been added to the bag.
